description: Cables routed across raised floor walkways or aisle paths creating trip hazards
visual_signals: cable draped across aisle floor
patch cord running between racks over walkway
bundle crossing walking path without protection

description: Tangled or disorganized cable management restricting airflow through racks or cable trays
visual_signals: dense cable spaghetti behind rack
cables blocking rack ventilation holes
overfilled cable tray

description: Raised floor tile displaced, cracked, or not properly seated in grid allowing air bypass
visual_signals: floor tile shifted out of grid
visible crack across tile surface
tile corner lifted or rocking

description: Visible dust accumulation on server air intake vents reducing cooling efficiency
visual_signals: gray dust layer on front bezels
clogged mesh filter on intake
dust bunnies near rack base

description: Water pooling, dripping, or condensation detected near electrical equipment or under raised floor
visual_signals: water puddle on floor
drip stain on ceiling tile above rack
condensation on cold pipe near servers

description: UPS battery showing signs of swelling, leaking electrolyte, or corrosion on terminals
visual_signals: bulging battery case
white crystalline corrosion on terminals
wet residue around battery base

description: Fire suppression panel displaying fault, alarm, or trouble indicator
visual_signals: amber or red fault LED on panel
trouble message on suppression display
suppression system in bypass mode

description: Combustible materials such as cardboard boxes or packing materials stored inside data hall
visual_signals: cardboard boxes on floor near racks
packing foam or paper in server room
wooden pallets inside data hall

description: Hot aisle or cold aisle containment compromised by missing blanking panels or open rack positions
visual_signals: open U-space in rack without blanking panel
curtain detached from containment frame
gap between rack tops and ceiling

description: Server or network equipment displaying amber or red fault LEDs indicating hardware failure
visual_signals: amber LED lit on drive bay
red fault indicator on power supply
blinking error light on switch module

description: Cable runs sagging between racks or from overhead trays due to insufficient support
visual_signals: cable bundle drooping between ladder rungs
weight pulling tray downward
unsupported span longer than support interval

description: Emergency Power Off button obstructed, unlabeled, or missing protective cover
visual_signals: EPO button blocked by equipment
no label on red mushroom button
missing flip cover on EPO switch
